narrative:
Hamilton City has 35,559 registered voters, with 63.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a clear Republican lean of 7.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.6% D−R vs -14.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
